Video.summary: Danette & Matthew sleep alone at night because they live in different states. The Cutlers help them decide where to call home.
Video.title: Mahabeer vs. Turner

Video.summary: Sanela and Nic found their love is getting lost in the hustle and bustle of NYC and are seeking help from the Cutlers.
Video.title: Begani vs Crespo

Video.summary: Harmoni suspects Jarren is cheating and has demanded he take a polygraph to prove his fidelity.
Video.title: Lockhart vs Reid

Video.summary: Rosa says that Michael took her TV to repair and never brought it back and now she wants her money.
Video.title: Please Stand By

Video.summary: High school sweethearts Darionna and Elijah seek help from the judges after getting a bitter taste of the struggles in marriage.
Video.title: Truell vs. Truell

Video.summary: Ronald and Rhonda let a kitchen renovation bring out the worst in eachother.
Video.title: Relationship Renovations

Video.summary: Plaintiff, Reprudentia, is suing a fellow Cameroonian countryman for the $5000 she gave him to buy her a car.
Video.title: Car Troubles

Video.summary: Kaitlynn claims her ex abused her while pregnant with his child and is here to sue him for over $4,000.
Video.title: Playing House Gone Wrong

Video.summary: Lenore Stellmacher sues her former friend, Elizabeth Ruiz, for $920, claiming she loaned her money that was never repaid. Elizabeth denies borrowing anything and accuses Lenore of being jealous of her new relationship.
Video.title: Friendship Fireworks Over a Loan

Video.summary: An exhausted mother gets a surprise after putting her dreams on hold for her family.
Video.title: Prince vs. Thornton

Video.summary: Amanda is suing her nail tech Jonyell after paying her to take a nail class but she breached their contract.
Video.title: Getting Nailed for Class Tuition

Video.summary: While shopping for a website designer Brent met Joe but what a tangle website of woes did they weave.
Video.title: Website of Woes

Video.summary: Christopher is suing his brother Ashlee for punches his tooth out over some spilled juice.
Video.title: My House My Couch

Video.summary: Demario and Necole’s relationship is tested when he tries to impose his conservative Christian values onto her.
Video.title: Scott vs. Thomas

Video.summary: Anita is ready for marriage, but Roman suspects she has been cheating; a polygraph may push him to propose or dispose.
Video.title: Raggs vs. Walker

Video.summary: A DNA test, a relationship on the edge and an ultimatum that could change everything put a young couple's future on the line.
Video.title: Wright vs. Flanagan

Video.summary: Texas pair Joel and Erin go head to head in court to handle some unfinished business after their breakup.
Video.title: Whitaker vs. Estevez

Video.summary: Choreographer Bryant sues ex-girlfriend and R&B artist Olivia for non-payment of services rendered for a music video.
Video.title: Huey vs. Walker

Video.summary: A broken gaming console and a stolen laptop have exes Dominique and Deon standing before the judges.
Video.title: Childress vs. Alston

Video.summary: Will is bringing Jazmine to court in a last-ditch effort to save their relationship from the stresses of social media.
Video.title: Bouie vs. Jackson

Video.summary: Multiple evictions and growing collection fees have exes Diamond and Eric arguing in court over who's at fault.
Video.title: Walton vs. Watkins

Video.summary: Judy is suing her niece for 12 months of unpaid rent. Cassandra says there was never a deal to pay any rent.
Video.title: Unconditional Rent

Video.summary: Sean Amey is suing his former roommates for his security deposit after being forced out of the apartment through calculated scheming. The roommates admit to lying but say that he deserved it.
Video.title: Rowdy Roommate Ruckus

Video.summary: Kent loaned Elizabath five grand to help pay for her dental work but is now asking for it back.
Video.title: Love Bites

Video.summary: Is James splitting hairs with Carle over his bad hair day or is there just a hair more about this case?
Video.title: Splitting Hairs

Video.summary: Michael, a clown and Elvis Presley impersonator, is suing his talent agent for unpaid dues.
Video.title: Bonzo and the Hound Dog

Video.summary: Nigel says that he got ripped off. Now he wants his money back from producer Daunte.
Video.title: Beating the Bank

Video.summary: This car-crazy sister claims she was scammed by her big brother's bogus paint job, and wants her money back.
Video.title: The Big Bro Botch

Video.summary: Natash is suing her younger sister for damages from to her home from wild parties that she threw.
Video.title: House Party

Video.summary: Gloria McPherson sues photographer Aston Watson for $600, claiming he botched her wedding by failing to deliver on services, including a second photographer and an album. Aston defends, blaming her behavior and even her guests' looks.
Video.title: Wedding Photo Fiasco

Video.summary: Renoda sues her ex’s girlfriend, Cheryl, for $787, alleging she slashed her tires, broke a window, and posted an explicit video online. Cheryl countersues for $1,551, claiming Renoda keyed her car.
Video.title: Sex Tape Scandal

Video.summary: Harriet Taylor sues neighbor Annette Michael for $K after a cut vine allegedly caused a shed to collapse, destroying Lalique and Baccarat crystal. Annette denies damaging the shed, questioning why the crystal was stored outdoors.
Video.title: Roof Damage Ruckus

Video.summary: Erica sues ex-roommate Palermo for $245.85 in unpaid utility bills, calling him a nightmare and inappropriate. Palermo counters for $3,300, claiming she broke their guest rules and overcharged him for rent.
Video.title: Raunchy Roommate

Video.summary: Alexandria Pham claims Christy Lynn Gibel ran a red light while texting, crashed into her car, and lacks valid insurance. Christy denies fault, arguing Alexandria caused the crash. Now, Alexandria is suing for $3,575.61 in damages.
Video.title: Little Women: LA Star in Court!

Image.alt: Little Women: LA Star in Court!
Little Women: LA Star in Court!
Little Women: LA Star in Court!

Video.summary: Prestonie sues his mother for assault and hotel bills and claims she admitted to hating him.
Video.title: Mommy Issues

Video.summary: Trying to regain custody of her children, Shamika wants to prove her ex is the father of her youngest child.
Video.title: Plaintiff’s Paternity Petition

Video.summary: Derek is suing for breach of contract after claiming the female dancers he ordered were on their phones.
Video.title: Dance Party Full of Missteps

Video.summary: The plaintiff sues her ex-boyfriend for a cellphone and cellphone bill and says she caught him cheating; he brings to court threatening text messages she sent to him.
Video.title: Calling Collect

Video.summary: A couple say they bought a trailer from their neighbor, but he never gave it to them; he says they called the police and made death threats against him, so he's counter-suing for harassment.
Video.title: Trailer Troubles

Video.summary: As retribution for his serial cheating, Jaylon sues boyfriend Brian for payment from their online video sharing channel profits.
Video.title: Davis vs. Alben

Video.summary: Allison says her baby daddy rarely sees their child, and she is suing for the cost of ballet classes and bills
Video.title: Too Passionate for Parenting

Video.summary: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for rent and emotional distress because he cheated on her with their roommate.
Video.title: The Roommate Affair

Video.summary: Carol is suing her husband for using her money for a bachelor party. Marion argues it was a joint account.
Video.title: The Wedding Thief

Video.summary: Were they loans? Was she funding her gambling boyfriend in order to rake in the profit?
Video.title: Going for Broke

Video.summary: Amanda is suing her ex-best friend Bernardo for thousands spent on bail money to hair care.
Video.title: Ya Booze Ya Lose

Video.summary: Candace is suing a used car salesman for a car she never kept. He claims that he offered her 15 cars.
Video.title: When Life Gives You A Lemon

Image.alt: When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon

Video.summary: Jillian is suing her former landlord for rent, claiming they were perfect tenants. Their landlord, Stephen, claims they partied nonstop and caused damage to the home and surrounding property.
Video.title: Terrible Tenant or Low-Down Landlord?

Video.summary: Mark is suing his sister over his home's repair work. She claims that he is lying and exaggerating.
Video.title: A Riff in the Family
